title: Nostalgic Bed
description: Replaces the modern Bed crafting system with the oldschool nostalgic Red Bed Recipe.
body:
![Image Displaying Logo of Nostalgic Bed Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3746bd9c2bf03fbba9a3cc89b38dbe6e34bc12b.png)

This is a nostalgia Datapack/Mod. You can craft the Red Bed with any wool/wood combination. To get other colors, just dye the Bed. It also makes crafting the Bed on your first day much less of a hassle. ![An Image showing an example Crafting process](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/73IDb6tB/images/0d51d9fe702ddf9254fa8d09f36e253bec5e2e42.png) ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## ❗Issues & Suggestions Please report issues immediately on [my Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H).
